description: Maps known failure patterns to automatic workarounds. Used by autonomy-improver and ci-self-heal to auto-recover without human intervention.

workaround.strategy: Switch to cheaper model (Haiku) + direct API fallback via curl
workaround.implementation: claude_args: --model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 --max-turns 3, then curl fallback

workaround.strategy: Exponential backoff: 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s. Max 4 retries.
workaround.implementation: for i in 1 2 3 4; do curl ... && break; sleep $((2**i)); done

workaround.strategy: Cannot auto-fix expired tokens. Create @claude issue with instructions to check Settings > Secrets.
workaround.implementation: gh api repos/.../issues POST with needs-claude label

workaround.strategy: Run eslint --fix, commit, re-trigger CI
workaround.implementation: fix-corporate-ci.yml auto-dispatched by ci-monitor-loop

workaround.strategy: Download logs, analyze error pattern, match against errorRecovery, create fix patch or escalate
workaround.implementation: ci-diagnose.yml + ci-failure-analysis.yml pipeline

workaround.strategy: Parse TS error codes, add missing imports/types, fix type mismatches
workaround.implementation: ci-self-heal.yml pattern matching

workaround.strategy: Retry up to 4x with exponential backoff. If persistent, check DNS/proxy.
workaround.implementation: Built into git push/fetch retry logic

workaround.strategy: Clean npm cache, remove node_modules, reduce artifact retention
workaround.implementation: Add cleanup step before npm ci

workaround.strategy: Increment patch version and retry. Follow X.Y.9 → X.(Y+1).0 rule.
workaround.implementation: Read current tag from CAP, bump version, update 4 version files

workaround.strategy: Fetch latest main, rebase branch, force-push, retry merge
workaround.implementation: git fetch + rebase + push in auto-merge workflows

workaround.strategy: workflow-auto-repair.yml re-enables disabled workflows automatically
workaround.implementation: gh api .../actions/workflows/{id}/enable

workaround.strategy: Cancel stuck run, wait 30s, re-trigger
workaround.implementation: workflow-auto-repair.yml detects and cancels stuck runs

patterns.trigger: Unable to resolve action|action does not exist

workaround.strategy: Pin action to specific SHA or replace with alternative. Check GitHub Marketplace for alternatives.
workaround.implementation: Manual review needed — escalate to @claude

workaround.strategy: Replace $(cat <<EOF) heredoc with direct string variable. GHA run blocks interpret heredoc differently.
workaround.implementation: Use BODY variable assignment instead of inline heredoc in workflow run steps

workaround.strategy: Never pass raw JSON through ${{ }} expressions. Use base64 encoding or temp files.
workaround.implementation: base64 -w0 for inter-step data, jq for JSON construction

workaround.strategy: Replace for...of with .forEach/.map/.filter/.reduce. Pre-commit-validate.sh catches this.
workaround.implementation: sed -i to convert for(const x of arr) to arr.forEach(x => {})

workaround.strategy: Parse TS error: identify source file + line + expected vs actual type. Fix type assertion or add proper typing.
workaround.implementation: ci-diagnose.yml parses TS errors, fix-corporate-ci applies type fixes

workaround.strategy: Never use search-replace for multi-line content. Use replace-file action with full file in patches/.
workaround.implementation: Change trigger action from search-replace to replace-file with content_ref

workaround.strategy: Wait 30 min via deploy-pipeline-monitor. If still stuck, escalate with full context.
workaround.implementation: deploy-pipeline-monitor.yml detects stuck runs, dispatches ci-monitor-loop

workaround.strategy: Parse test output: identify test file + assertion + expected vs received. Often caused by error message changes in source that break snapshot tests.
workaround.implementation: ci-failure-analysis.yml categorizes as test-failure, escalates to @claude

fallbackChain.description: When a primary approach fails, try fallbacks in order

api-call.method: Direct curl to Anthropic API with Haiku

autoDiscovery.description: When an unknown failure is encountered, the system should automatically research alternatives
steps: 1. Match error message against known patterns in this file
2. If no match: search contracts/claude-session-memory.json errorRecovery
3. If no match: create @claude issue with full error context
4. @claude analyzes, implements fix, and adds new pattern to this file
5. Pattern is now auto-fixable for future occurrences
autoDiscovery.learningLoop: autonomy-improver.yml reads this file + tracker → matches failures → applies workarounds → updates patterns
